title: Standardize error handling across backends — typed throws vs silent swallow
description: PRD §3: Some backends silently swallow errors while others throw. Standardize behavior: NotFoundError for missing files on read/stat, PermissionDeniedError for permission issues, IOError for I/O failures. Ensure all backends throw typed errors consistently instead of returning null or silently succeeding. Add tests for error cases. Target: PRD §3 unified error format gap.
